channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Vintage Postcards Highlight Marlene Dietrich’s Iconic Style and Hollywood Career in the 1930s
item.description: The article from Vintage Everyday presents a collection of 50 vintage postcards featuring actress and singer Marlene Dietrich during the 1930s, a decade that established her as one of Hollywood’s most...

item.title: President Marcos Jr. Pays Respects to Fallen PAF Personnel After Aircraft Crash
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. visited the wake of Philippine Air Force (PAF) personnel who died in a recent aircraft crash, according to a report published by ABS-CBN News on May 24, 2026. The visit ...

item.title: Telangana government to launch women-led solar plants and welfare initiatives during Women’s Week
item.description: Telangana Minister for Panchayat Raj and Rural Development Danasari Anasuya, popularly known as Seethakka, announced that Chief Minister A. Revanth Reddy will inaugurate solar power plants operated by...

item.title: Jigawa residents call for ban on betting over financial losses and social concerns
item.description: Some residents in Dutse, Jigawa State, have called on authorities to impose a total ban on betting activities, citing serious financial losses and growing social concerns. The individuals, who spoke i...

item.title: Police investigate deaths of missing Mossel Bay couple in Kruger National Park
item.description: Limpopo police have confirmed the identities of an elderly couple found dead in the Kruger National Park as Dina Marais, 73, and Ernst Marais, 71, from Mossel Bay in the Western Cape. The couple had b...

item.title: Marvel confirms third season of Daredevil: Born Again ahead of 2027 release
item.description: The second season of Marvel’s Disney+ series ‘Daredevil: Born Again’ has recently concluded, prompting renewed interest in the future of the show. The series, which continues and revives the story of ...

item.title: Hip surgeon warns against delaying medical care for persistent hip pain
item.description: A hip surgeon interviewed in a wellness feature emphasizes the importance of not ignoring persistent hip pain, warning that delaying medical attention can lead to more serious long-term joint problems...

item.title: Nkosinathi Sibisi leads Orlando Pirates to historic league title after ending Sundowns’ dominance
item.description: Orlando Pirates captain Nkosinathi Sibisi has had the final word after guiding his side to a long-awaited league championship, silencing critics who doubted his leadership earlier in the season. The P...

item.title: Western Bulldogs hold off Melbourne in thriller after Beveridge inspires team with historic resilience story
item.description: The Western Bulldogs have secured a narrow three-point victory over Melbourne in a tense AFL clash defined by momentum swings, costly errors, and late-game heroics. Joel Freijah and Rhylee West combin...

item.title: Marco Rubio says new US immigration and visa reforms are global measures, not aimed specifically at India
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio stated during a press conference in New Delhi that the recent immigration and visa policy changes introduced by the Donald Trump administration are not specifically t...

item.title: Russian missile and drone attack on Kyiv kills civilians and damages residential areas and schools
item.description: Russia launched a major overnight missile and drone attack on Kyiv on May 24, 2026, killing at least two people and injuring more than 80 others, according to Ukrainian authorities. Ukrainian Presiden...

item.title: Vehicle-borne suicide blast hits shuttle train in Quetta, killing 14 and injuring dozens
item.description: A deadly vehicle-borne suicide bombing targeted a shuttle train near Chaman Phatak in Quetta on May 24, 2026, leaving at least 14 people dead and around 20 others injured, according to the Balochistan...

item.title: 1940s Photobooth Portraits Reveal the Fashion and Personality of Young Women During Wartime America
item.description: The article from Vintage Everyday explores a collection of photobooth portraits featuring teenage girls and young women from the 1940s. These black-and-white images provide a candid glimpse into every...

item.title: Court orders review of Samuel Wanjiru estate grant to include child born outside marriage
item.description: The High Court in Nakuru has ordered a review of the grant of probate that had earlier been issued to the widow of former marathon champion Samuel Wanjiru, so as to include a child born out of wedlock...

item.title: Mixx and Hisense launch World Cup 2026 campaign offering prizes and cash rewards in Tanzania
item.description: Dar es Salaam. Mixx, a mobile financial services provider, has teamed up with electronics giant Hisense to roll out a nationwide campaign linked to the FIFA World Cup 2026™ in Tanzania. The campaign, ...

item.title: Rescuers continue search operations after mine explosion in China leaves 82 dead
item.description: Chinese rescue teams are continuing intensive search operations for missing workers following a deadly mine explosion that has already claimed at least 82 lives, according to reports. The incident occ...

item.title: Declining snowfall in Greece’s mountains raises concerns and impacts local economy
item.description: A recent Associated Press report highlights growing concern in Greece as snowfall in the country’s mountainous regions continues to decline, a trend that scientists and local communities link to broad...

item.title: Opinion: Political tensions and media conflicts highlight debate over Trump’s sense of humor and free speech
item.description: This opinion piece argues that Donald Trump’s political career reflects a significant decline in his ability to engage with humor, particularly in contrast to previous U.S. presidents such as Barack O...

item.title: Mexico defeat Ghana in World Cup warm-up as Aguirre assesses squad ahead of tournament opener against Bafana
item.description: Mexico secured a 2-0 victory over Ghana in a World Cup warm-up match played in Puebla on Friday, as anticipation builds ahead of the 2026 tournament, which Mexico will co-host with Canada and the Unit...

item.title: Amit Shah to chair security review meeting on India–Pakistan border and anti-drone systems in Rajasthan
item.description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah is scheduled to undertake a two-day visit to Rajasthan beginning Monday night to review the security situation along the India–Pakistan border, with a special focus on co...
